name: Ninjitsu Art of Shadow Sealing
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぽう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>影</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かげ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>縫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぬ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>いの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Tribute 1 "Ninja" monster to target 1 monster your opponent controls; banish that target. While that card is banished, its Monster Card Zone cannot be used. When this face-up card leaves the field: Return the card banished by this effect to the same Monster Card Zone, in the same battle position.
eff: Tribute 1 "Ninja" monster to target 1 monster your opponent controls; banish that target. While that card is banished, its Monster Card Zone cannot be used. When this face-up card leaves the field: Return the card banished by this effect to the same Monster Card Zone, in the same battle position.

action: Returns banished cards to the field
